en.title: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 55

blocks.value: FUD FAQ | A Weekly Community Thread | Week 55
Top Question of the Week
How do creators make money in web3, really?

Funny that you should ask that, because, it is wildly obvious that there is no end to the number of people on Crypto Twitter, project discords and all over the internet always eager to talk about how successful they have been in making bags all for themselves. Yet, there is a complete absence of clarity about what other creative people could do in a reliable and repeatable way to make their way up the bag generating ranks. With that in mind, we’re keeping an eye out for a new series of step by step visual street samizdat bringing how to know how direct to emerging artists and designers of all kinds.
Information wants to be free, so it’s about time that information includes how we can all be free to make more in web3.
Most Common Repeat Question
Will $MONA be listed on a centralised exchanged?

Well, it’s totally out of our hands. As everyone knows, DIGITALAX is entirely focused on the advancement of maximal and practical decentralisation in all forms. That includes exchange listings. Many may not know that behind the scenes at almost all centralised exchanges there is a heavy element of pay to play, which, not only do we not have any willingness to engage in, but don’t believe that any true web3 project should either.

Beyond that however, if a crypto OG like Coinbase chooses on their own to recognise how cool everything happening at the forefront of web3 fashion and the metaverse is, and decides to include us, as they did last week, in their first ever announcement of a fully transparent look at the top 50 tokens they are considering at the moment, then, not only do we not have any opposition to it, but, we appreciate the acknowledgement.
Top Controversies
Apparently censorship is the new Black.
BlackRock thinks so highly of their ability to use money as raw power that they can abuse the trademark system to censor the use of the word black in all contexts at all times.
Silly Fails and Trolling

Can you imagine an internet where the leading platform for snappy snippets of memetic conversation in the defacto public square was owned by a deranged, violent, employee beating wannabe playboy plagiarist fake web3 CCP evading crypto billionaire.

Justin Sun is at it again, following up Elon’s bid for Twitter ownership with an absurd offer of his own. Let’s hope that we aren’t on the verge of pushing the bounds of the Overton window yet again on the cusp of an even worse darkest timeline.
View all FUD FAQ here.
If you would like a question answered or contribute content to next weeks article please reach out through our DIGITALAX Discord server in #FUD-FAQ channel!

ازاي do creators make money في web3, really?

Well, it’s totally out من our hands. As everyone knows, DIGITALAX is entirely focused على ال advancement من maximal و practical decentralisation في all forms. That includes exchange listings. Many may not know that behind ال scenes at almost all centralised exchanges there is a heavy element من pay الى play, which, not only do we not have any willingness الى engage في, but don’t believe that any true web3 project should either.

Beyond that however, if a crypto OG like Coinbase chooses على their own الى recognise ازاي cool everything happening at ال forefront من web3 فاشون و ال metaverse is, و decides الى include us, as they did last اسبوع, في their first ever announcement من a fully transparent look at ال top 50 tokens they are considering at ال moment, then, not only do we not have any opposition الى it, but, we appreciate ال acknowledgement.
أهم الجدل
Apparently censorship is ال جديد Black.
BlackRock thinks so highly من their ability الى use money as raw power that they can abuse ال trademark system الى censor ال use من ال word black في all contexts at all times.
Silly Fails و Trolling

Justin Sun is at it again, following up Elon’s bid لـ Twitter ownership مع an absurd offer من his own. Let’s hope that we aren’t على ال verge من pushing ال bounds من ال Overton window yet again على ال cusp من an even worse darkest timeline.
